arts.ttl: Liverpool match 129-year goalscoring record in Premier League title-clinching Tottenham thrashing
arts.sum: Liverpool equal a club goalscoring record by putting five goals past Tottenham Hotspur in Sunday's Premier League title-clinching victory.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk says Liverpool 'truly deserved' to win the Premier League after sealing title with thumping 5-1 victory over Tottenham
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk hailed his side as the 'truly deserved' champions of England after they secured the Premier League title with four games to spare.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hails Liverpool's title triumph as 'quite unreal' and insists 'I don't think we could have lost today' despite seeing Tottenham initially take the lead
arts.sum: Liverpool are champions of England for a record-equalling 20th time - and boss Arne Slot hailed a special day for everyone associated with the club.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hails Liverpool's title triumph as 'quite unreal' and insists 'I don't think we could have lost today' despite seeing Tottenham initially take the lead
arts.sum: Liverpool are champions of England for a record-equalling 20th time - and boss Arne Slot hailed a special day for everyone associated with the club.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot returns Jurgen Klopp compliment after winning title with Liverpool
arts.sum: One of Klopp’s final acts as Reds boss was sing Slot’s name as he bade an emotional farewell to Anfield.

arts.ttl: Liverpool secure Premier League title with crushing win against Tottenham
arts.sum: The title, secured with four games to spare, is only the Merseysiders’ second in 35 years.
